name: Ember March
specialty: Renowned for their swift and silent infiltration techniques, the Ember March are a trusted crew for discrete jobs within the Undercity.

members.name: Gideon Blackwood
members.note: A former member of the Iron Fang Consortium, he carries a deep-seated grudge against them.

members.name: Elara Nightshade
members.note: Known for her keen senses, she often wears a mask to conceal her identity.

members.name: Vexil Stonefist
members.note: His battle-scarred visage and heavy warhammer are a constant reminder of his fearsome combat prowess.

members.name: Zephyr Thunderfoot
members.note: His silver-tipped tail and smooth-talking charm make negotiations seem effortless.

visual: Clad in dark, form-fitting leather armor, they move with calculated precision through the crowded streets of the Undercity. Each member is easily identified by their unique markings: Gideon's scarred right cheek, Elara's mask, Vexil's battle scars, and Zephyr's silver tail.
reputation_note: The Ember March is a name whispered with both admiration and caution, their skills and stealth earning them a reputation as the Undercity's most trusted - and feared - crew.
